commonMedications.name: Semaglutide / GLP-1 (Ozempic) [P1]
commonMedications.coverageNote: Covered under GMS medical card or Drugs Payment Scheme (€80/mo cap per family)

commonMedications.name: Atorvastatin 20mg [P1]
commonMedications.coverageNote: GMS or DPS; generic pricing applies

medicine.pharmacyAccess: Boots, LloydsPharmacy, and independent pharmacies throughout Ireland. Late-night pharmacies in cities. Prescription required for most medications.
medicine.notes: Ireland has the Drugs Payment Scheme (DPS) capping family medication costs at €80/month. Medical card holders (income-tested or over-70) pay nothing. Over-70s get automatic medical card. Prices shown assume DPS or medical card coverage.

plans.name: Google Fi Flexible (US Number)
plans.notes: Line 1 $20 + Line 2 $15 = $35 base. Data $10/GB × 3GB = $30. Works in Ireland at same rate. Keeps US number for banking/2FA.

plans.name: Three Ireland SIM-Only
plans.notes: 2 lines €12/line (~$13). Three has best 5G coverage. EU roaming included.
